name: Lamb and Pine Nut Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Bok Choy, Cut Into 1-inch Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the boneless lamb by partially freezing it first, then thinly slicing into bite-size strips.
2. In a 2-cup measure, stir together 1/3 cup water, oyster sauce, cornstarch, grated gingerroot, and chicken bouillon granules. Cook on 100% power for 1½ to 2 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
3. In a small nonmetal bowl, combine the bok choy, sliced mushrooms, and 2 tablespoons water. Cover with vented clear plastic wrap. Cook on 100% power for 3 to 4 minutes or until the bok choy is just crisp-tender. Drain.
4. Preheat a 6½-inch microwave browning dish on 100% power for 3 minutes.
5. Add cooking oil to the preheated dish and swirl to coat. Add the lamb strips. Cook covered on 100% power for 1½ to 2½ minutes or until the lamb is done. Drain off any excess fat.
6. Stir in the oyster sauce mixture with toasted pine nuts and the bok choy mixture. Serve over hot cooked rice if desired.
